title: llm_plan_task task bundle (v1)
description: Structural contract for the success output of tasks_from_plan / plan_to_tasks (fields: plan, tasks, execution_order, run_id). The embedded plan MUST also validate against schemas/plan.v1.json; validate_task_bundle() in actions/lib/plan_model.py applies this schema, validate_plan(plan), and Python-only checks (task rows align with plan steps, execution_order matches the Kahn topological order used in code, run_id shape).

plan.description: Normalized plan from validate_plan; MUST satisfy sibling schemas/plan.v1.json. Not re-embedded here to avoid duplicating plan step rules; consumers should validate the plan with plan.v1 or call validate_task_bundle().

execution_order.description: Task ids in dependency-safe topological order (see README / EMT-70). Must be a permutation of tasks[].id; order invariants are enforced in Python.

run_id.description: UUID string from plan_to_tasks (uuid.uuid4); pattern is not enforced in schema alone.

id.description: Stable task id: task-<step_id> after plan_to_tasks.

description.description: May be empty string after normalization.

status.description: tasks_from_plan / plan_to_tasks emit pending tasks only on success.

action_ref.description: Optional StackStorm action reference; omitted when the step has none.

action_parameters.description: JSON object only; requires non-empty action_ref in validate_task_bundle Python checks.
